title: parietaria officinalis subsp. erecta
intro: Parietaria officinalis subsp. erecta, also known as upright Pellitory or upright Nettle-leaved Pellitory, is a plant species belonging to the family Urticaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Parietaria officinalis subsp. erecta include relief from pain, inflammation, and itching, as well as potential uses in treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various methods of consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
